content: The roulette betting board must fit within 100vh and 100vw without any scrolling. All agents must use CSS Grid, vmin, or fractional units (fr) to ensure a compact, responsive fit. Do NOT use fixed pixel heights that cause overflow. Do NOT rely on overflow-y: auto as a workaround — the layout itself must fit. All numbers (0–36) and all outside bets must be visible without any scrolling.
